data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Uses Gestalt principles to enhance user interface design.
data.technical_spec: Emphasis on similarity, proximity, and continuity in layout arrangements.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by limiting the number of choices presented to users.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation and minimalistic design focus to aid quicker user choices.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes touch targets based on use frequency and required accuracy.
data.technical_spec: Placement and size of interactive elements according to anticipated usage patterns.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Respects cognitive load limits by grouping information into smaller, digestible clusters.
data.technical_spec: Information architecture designed to support chunking for improved comprehension.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Creates a visually pleasing interface to enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: High-quality graphics and a consistent color palette ensure cohesive visual design.
